_comment: Polk County Public Schools school + program index. SEED DATA — compiled from web research of the FLDOE MSID database, NCES Common Core of Data (NCES district ID 1201590), and the official Polk County Schools website (polkschoolsfl.com). MSIDs use the '53XXXX' pattern (district 53 + 4-digit school number); where the exact 4-digit school number was not confirmed via FLDOE MSID, a placeholder 'XXXX' suffix is used. Open/close status and program details must be verified against the FLDOE MSID authority before any reliance. NEVER add student or unconsented staff PII here.

authority.school_list: FLDOE MSID + Polk County Schools website
authority.note: MSID is canonical for the school list + open/closed status. Polk County is Florida district 53, the 6th-largest district in the state with 165+ schools. Key cities: Lakeland, Winter Haven, Bartow (county seat), Haines City, Lake Wales, Auburndale, Mulberry, Davenport, Frostproof, Fort Meade, Eagle Lake, Lake Alfred, Dundee, Poinciana.
